_readme: Drop a descriptions.json like this in any subfolder inside images/fulls/. The key is the exact filename of the photo. Re-running 'npm run build' will pick these up automatically without overwriting them.
IMG_001.jpg: Golden hour over the valley, shot handheld at the edge of the ridge.
DSC_4421.jpg: Long exposure of the harbour lights — 25 second shot from a tripod on the jetty.
R0006909.jpg: Street portrait, Tokyo Shinjuku. Available light only.
